hooks.command: python3 -c "import subprocess, sys, os; f=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH',''); ext=os.path.splitext(f)[1] if f else ''; subprocess.run(['ruff','format',f],capture_output=True) if ext=='.py' and os.path.exists(f) else None"

python3 -c "import os,datetime; d=os.path.join(os.getcwd(),'.neuroflow','sessions'); t=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME','tool'); p=os.path.join(d,datetime.date.today().isoformat()+'.md'); [open(p,'a').write(f'- {datetime.datetime.now().strftime(\"%H:%M\")} [{t}]\n')] if os.path.isdir(d) else None"
